<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:index:parent::parent]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:index:child: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:index:parent$pkgA:index:child::child]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 2 created<{%reset%}>
